---
title: "Research"
---

## Publications

-   **Jaziri-Arjona, T.** (2021). *Las brechas electorales generacional y urbano-rural en el voto a Vox.* In Oliván Navarro, F. (Eds.), [El toro por los cuernos: Vox, la extrema derecha europea y el voto obrero.](https://www.tecnos.es/libro/semilla-y-surco/el-toro-por-los-cuernos-vox-la-extrema-derecha-europea-y-el-voto-obrero-fidel-olivan-navarro-9788430981212/) Tecnos.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Working Projects

-   Social Networks and the Educational Gap between Early and Late New Party Voters

-   Mobility, Reference Group Change, and the Spread of Political Norms: How Summer Holidays normalize the Radical Right in Spain (with Vicente Valentim)

-   Clusters of Radical Politics? Heterogeneous Social Networks as a Safeguard against the Radical Right (with Jona De Jong)

-   Local Female Political Representation and the Gender Gap in Voting for the Greens (with Ingvild Zinober)

-   No rain in sight - The electoral effect of water restrictions in France (with Nina Lopez-Uroz & Rens Chazottes)

-   The Electoral Consequences of Immigrants Enfranchasiment (with Simon Hix)
